texto: You will learn about the twinned natures of fate and faith, at times spun together in threads fine as cotton candy, that taste just as sweet and evaporate just as quick. It is not right to say that you will have her, because you cannot truly possess another person. Nor should you even want such a thing.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Trevor Dodge sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “You will learn about the twinned natures of fate and faith, at times spun together in threads fin…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, faith, fate, útil em momentos de fate e love.
